fronts.description: The kharisiri death cult feeds the imprisoned Father of Maggots and grows under Larkin's intervention.

dangers.impulse: to protect Larkin's mission and cull witnesses
moves: open kharisiri assault at the ruins

dangers.impulse: to feed and return fat/offerings to the pyramid crack
moves: vomit offerings into the pyramid crack

clocks.label: Ward integrity / god pressure
clocks.advance_when: kharisiri feed the crack, larvae escape, or gold ward is further damaged

fronts.description: Nyarlathotep's hold on Larkin tightens as the expedition nears the pyramid.

dangers.impulse: to break the ward and reject interference
moves: urge stripping gold from the ruins

clocks.label: Larkin possession
clocks.advance_when: Mythos stress, tattoo exposure, or arrival at the pyramid
